query:
UPDATE game_agents SET
  gather_power = ROUND(wuxing_wood * 1.5 + 10),
  forge_power = ROUND(wuxing_fire * 1.5 + 10),
  carry_weight = ROUND(wuxing_earth * 1.5 + 10),
  refine_power = ROUND(wuxing_metal * 1.5 + 10),
  treasure_hunting = ROUND(wuxing_water * 1.5 + 10),
  skill_slot_1 = CASE dominant_element
    WHEN 'wood' THEN 'wood-basic-atk'
    WHEN 'fire' THEN 'fire-basic-atk'
    WHEN 'earth' THEN 'earth-basic-atk'
    WHEN 'metal' THEN 'metal-basic-atk'
    WHEN 'water' THEN 'water-basic-atk'
    ELSE 'water-basic-atk'
  END,
  skill_slot_2 = CASE dominant_element
    WHEN 'wood' THEN 'wood-heal'
    WHEN 'fire' THEN 'fire-burst'
    WHEN 'earth' THEN 'earth-shield'
    WHEN 'metal' THEN 'metal-pierce'
    WHEN 'water' THEN 'water-flow'
    ELSE 'water-flow'
  END,
  passive_slot_1 = CASE dominant_element
    WHEN 'wood' THEN 'wood-regen'
    WHEN 'fire' THEN 'fire-boost'
    WHEN 'earth' THEN 'earth-tough'
    WHEN 'metal' THEN 'metal-crit'
    WHEN 'water' THEN 'water-sense'
    ELSE 'water-sense'
  END
WHERE skill_slot_1 IS NULL;
